subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-05-17
subcodes.first_line: There are two kinds of afflictions, the first is human, the second is divine. Human affliction can be coped with and eradicated by human agencies and methods
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @chastisement and requital, @justice and wrath of God
